productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Unisex Dicolor Red Cap
description: Created using cotton fabric, this cap from adidas is a perfect blend of comfort and style. Crown made of cotton fabric with embroidered eyelets to offer breathable comfort to the head Curved visor with stitch detailing for enhanced durability Embroidered brand badge on the front Fabric covered button on the top of the cap Adjustable back strap with metal clasp for a customised Fit Cap care Hand wash in cold water Do not tumble dry or dry clean
